maxCharsPerChunk.description: Truncation cap applied to each chunk's content before insertion. Default 800.

totalCharBudget.description: Total cap on the Sources block size; chunks past this budget are dropped. Default 6000.

groundedHeader.description: Override the 'Use ONLY the sources below…' instruction line shown when chunks are present.

noResultsHeader.description: Override the header shown when retrieval returns 0 results.
